modelNote: Weights draw on 2018 tanker–macro joint patterns; tune for your deployment.

blend.description: Each market’s YES price is turned into a direction, weighted, and combined into one score. That score nudges the next-day YES up or down within a fixed cap, anchored to today’s price.

markets.question: What will WTI Crude Oil (WTI) hit in April 2026?
markets.hint: Upper-bin YES mass → stronger expected crude path (+oil beta).

markets.question: US × Iran ceasefire by the published deadline?
markets.hint: Ceasefire → lower geopolitical risk premium (−oil beta).

markets.question: Will CPI exceed 3.0% (inflation surprise)?
markets.hint: Sticky inflation ↔ energy costs; high inflation often tracks energy (+oil beta).

markets.question: US × Iran ceasefire before WTI hits $120?
markets.hint: YES → ceasefire resolves first, oil not yet at stress price (−oil beta).

markets.question: Will 45 or fewer ships transit the Strait of Hormuz this week?
markets.hint: Fewer transits → congestion / risk proxy (+oil beta).
